posts.author: cbennett (Caleb)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We would love to have a user be able to see if an item they’re assigned to is a Critical Path item via a column on the item rather than needing to look at Gantt view.

What are you trying to achieve

When a User views any item from anywhere, then they would see some sort of indicator that shows the item is a Critical Path item at a glance without viewing Gantt. This should update dynamically as dependencies change.

posts.author: QuintonH (Quinton Hurdidge)
posts.cookedHtml: I am very new to Monday.com but would also like to see this functionality (on the new Multi Level Boards) - So have voted for it. We will shortly be creating some templates (with a Monday.com Partner) that we think will have a work around to do exactly this. If that is the case I will update here (prob around 1 months time).

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Quick question, would an icon or visual indicator work instead of a full column? You can create a workaround with a formula or status column, but it won’t reflect the true dynamic critical path calculated in Gantt.

Having a native indicator that surfaces that same logic at the item level would make this way more actionable and help teams stay aligned without needing to jump into Gantt.
